loginBanner.description: A drone learning platform that helps you master flight technology, providing comprehensive foundational knowledge, core techniques, and safe hands-on skills through a structured learning path.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.confirmPasswordMin: Confirm password must be at least 6 characters

missionEnd.failDesc: Technical error or unexpected issue detected.

left.tooltip: Move drone left along X axis

right.tooltip: Move drone right along X axis

isObstacleAhead.tooltip: Check if there's an obstacle ahead of drone

PublicFooter.description: A platform connecting the drone community, learning through courses and 3D simulation labs.

hero.title: Take Off with Droniverse
hero.description: Connect with a community of drone clubs, learn from basic to advanced levels through structured courses, and practice with a vivid 3D simulation lab system that helps you build real-world skills.

community.title: Club Community
community.description: A place where drone enthusiasts gather, learn through club courses, and challenge themselves with internal competitions to improve their skills.

lab.title: Interactive 3D Simulation
lab.description: Program through an intuitive drag-and-drop interface with Blockly
lab.card3: Upload Code Directly to the Drone

connect.title: Connect with Us
connect.description: If you would like more consultation or want to collaborate with us, feel free to contact us anytime.

hero.title: Who Are We?
hero.description1: We build a drone learning platform that combines a club-based community, structured courses, and 3D simulation labs to help learners approach drone technology in a visual, safe, and effective way.
hero.description2: We are a platform that connects people passionate about drones, where learning goes beyond theory and is closely tied to practice, community, and advanced technology experiences.
hero.description3: Our goal is to help everyone — from beginners to advanced learners — gradually master drone technology in a structured and safe way.

feature1.title: Drone Club Community
feature1.description: Bringing together drone enthusiasts to learn through club-based courses and share experiences.

feature2.title: Structured Learning Path
feature2.description: A clear learning roadmap suitable for beginners and those who want to improve their skills.

feature3.title: 3D Simulation Lab
feature3.description: Practice flying and handling situations in a safe and intuitive 3D simulation environment.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To bring drone learning closer to everyone through community, high-quality courses, and a realistic 3D simulation environment.

feature.title: We believe that effective drone learning requires:
feature.feature3: A learning community that shares and grows together

feature1.title: Drone Clubs
feature1.description: Connect and grow the drone community

feature2.title: Training Organizations
feature2.description: Collaborate to build drone training programs
